B540.B542: Novel flat heating surface type gas stove

abstract.p: There is disclosed a novel flat heating surface type gas stove which is capable of heating a heating substance across a heat resistance glass at practically applicable heating efficiency, overcoming any inconvenience resulting from the exposure of flame and facilitating the cleaning of the gas stove.

claim.claim-text: A gas stove comprises a heat resistance glass top plate which is disposed over a burner, wherein a gas-permeable porous body is disposed below said top plate, and a space between said top plate and a surface of said gas-permeable porous body is assigned to a combustion space.

The gas stove according to claim 1, wherein combustion gas generated is designed to be discharged through said gas-permeable porous body. As high-temperature combustion gas passes through said gas-permeable porous body, radiant heat is generated from the surface of said gas-permeable porous body.
